evals.expected_output: Calls triage_orchestrator.py --type pr with --pr 91 (fallback: multi_review.py), authenticates via github_app.py, creates worktree, runs review, posts summary

assertions.name: uses_venv_python
assertions.check: Uses $SCRIPTS/.venv/bin/python3, not system python

assertions.name: calls_orchestrator
assertions.check: Invokes triage_orchestrator.py --type pr --pr 91 --json (with || multi_review.py fallback)

assertions.name: authenticates_first
assertions.check: Runs github_app.py token before any gh api calls

assertions.name: creates_worktree
assertions.check: Creates git worktree in /tmp/ for isolated review

assertions.name: parses_json_output
assertions.check: Parses orchestrator/multi_review.py JSON stdout for findings

assertions.name: generates_summary
assertions.check: Produces markdown summary with findings table

evals.prompt: run a multi-agent review on the current branch's PR, dry run
evals.expected_output: Auto-detects PR number from branch, runs review-only mode without posting to GitHub

assertions.name: detects_pr_from_branch
assertions.check: Runs gh pr view --json number --jq .number to get PR number

assertions.name: uses_dry_run
assertions.check: Passes --dry-run to triage_orchestrator.py or multi_review.py

assertions.name: no_github_posting
assertions.check: Does not call github_app.py pr review or post to PR

assertions.name: still_produces_summary
assertions.check: Outputs findings summary to terminal even in dry-run

evals.expected_output: Minimal invocation: detects repo and PR from current branch, runs full review pipeline

assertions.name: detects_repo
assertions.check: Parses org/repo from git remote get-url origin

assertions.name: detects_pr
assertions.check: Gets PR number from current branch via gh pr view

assertions.name: runs_full_pipeline
assertions.check: Executes setup, review, classification, and summary phases

assertions.name: cleans_up_worktree
assertions.check: Removes worktree and temporary branch after completion

evals.prompt: stark review (on main branch, no open PR on this branch)
evals.expected_output: Fails to detect PR, lists open PRs and asks user to specify a PR number

assertions.name: detects_no_pr
assertions.check: gh pr view fails or returns empty on main branch

assertions.name: lists_open_prs
assertions.check: Falls back to gh pr list to show available PRs

assertions.name: asks_user
assertions.check: Prompts user to provide a PR number rather than silently failing

assertions.name: no_worktree_created
assertions.check: Does not create a worktree before PR number is confirmed

evals.prompt: review PR 50 on design-system-core (rebase conflicts with main)
evals.expected_output: Attempts rebase, detects conflicts, aborts rebase, warns user, continues review with un-rebased branch

assertions.name: attempts_rebase
assertions.check: Runs git rebase origin/{base_ref} in worktree

assertions.name: detects_conflict
assertions.check: Checks rebase exit code for failure

assertions.name: aborts_rebase
assertions.check: Runs git rebase --abort on conflict

assertions.name: warns_user
assertions.check: Prints warning about rebase conflict to terminal

assertions.name: continues_review
assertions.check: Proceeds with review despite conflict — does not abort entirely

evals.prompt: review PR 50 (auth failure — stark-claude token expired)
evals.expected_output: Auth fails, reports error, does not proceed to post reviews but still runs the review itself

assertions.name: auth_fails_gracefully
assertions.check: Catches github_app.py token failure without crashing

assertions.name: reports_auth_error
assertions.check: Prints auth error message to terminal

assertions.name: skips_posting
assertions.check: Skips Phase 4a (posting review to PR) since auth failed

assertions.name: still_prints_summary
assertions.check: Outputs summary to terminal even without posting

evals.prompt: review PR 50 (test_command fails after fixes — new test regression)
evals.expected_output: Detects new test failures not in baseline, attempts to fix regressions, re-runs tests

assertions.name: captures_baseline
assertions.check: Records pre-existing test failures before fixing

assertions.name: detects_regression
assertions.check: Compares post-fix failures against baseline to find NEW failures only

assertions.name: fixes_regression
assertions.check: Attempts to fix code that caused the new test failure

assertions.name: reruns_tests
assertions.check: Re-runs test_command after fixing regression

assertions.name: max_attempts
assertions.check: Limits regression fix attempts (max 3 per round) then warns and proceeds
